messagesOfTheDay: Welcome to the demo. All systems operational.
UI Toolkit Code-Behind API is active.
Try navigating between screens and modals.
Check the test views for all supported element types.
This sample demonstrates the full API surface.
Use Tools/Code Behind/Regenerate to refresh generated files.
Add a new view with Tools/Code Behind/New View.
All subscription helpers auto-unbind on Deactivate().
The scanner auto-discovers templates from UI Toolkit/Templates/.
Generated fields use PascalCase of the UXML name attribute.

missions.name: Mission1
missions.title: First Contact
missions.description: Begin the adventure. Learn the basics and get started.

missions.name: Mission2
missions.title: The Crossing
missions.description: Traverse uncharted territory and discover new allies.

missions.name: Mission3
missions.title: Deep Dive
missions.description: Descend into the unknown. Danger lurks beneath.

missions.name: Mission4
missions.title: Breaking Through
missions.description: Push past enemy lines and secure the objective.

missions.name: Mission5
missions.title: Last Stand
missions.description: Hold the line against overwhelming odds.

missions.name: Mission7
missions.title: Counterstrike
missions.description: Turn the tide and push back the opposition.

missions.name: Mission8
missions.title: Dark Horizon
missions.description: Face the unknown in the shadow of war.

missions.name: Mission9
missions.title: Iron Will
missions.description: Endurance is the key. Survive and advance.

missions.name: Mission10
missions.title: Final Countdown
missions.description: The final objective is within reach.

missions.name: Mission11
missions.title: Ghost Protocol
missions.description: Stealth is paramount. Move in silence.

missions.name: Mission13
missions.title: Zero Hour
missions.description: The clock is ticking. Every second counts.

missions.name: Mission14
missions.title: Blindside
missions.description: Expect the unexpected. Trust your instincts.

missions.name: Mission15
missions.title: Endgame
missions.description: Everything comes down to this. Make it count.

difficulties.name: Recruit
difficulties.description: A relaxed experience. Enemies are less aggressive and deal reduced damage.

difficulties.name: Regular
difficulties.description: A balanced challenge. Enemies are tactical and deadly.

difficulties.name: Hardened
difficulties.description: Enemies are aggressive and accurate. Only the strong survive.

difficulties.name: Veteran
difficulties.description: The ultimate test. Enemies are relentless and lethal.
